special_mechanics.name: Trampoline Jumping
special_mechanics.description: Mappy can jump on trampolines that break after being jumped on multiple times before landing. Jungle World is an exception where trampolines do not break.

special_mechanics.name: Short Jump
special_mechanics.description: Mappy can perform a short jump to trigger stage-specific counterattack items and collect target items.

special_mechanics.name: Bonus Subarea Access
special_mechanics.description: Must jump on particular trampolines with no controller input while carrying zero distraction items to access bonus subareas. Successful input sends Mappy upward.

special_mechanics.name: Enemy Avoidance Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Mappy can jump over Meowkies and Goro if timed well. Goro becomes faster in later stories.

special_mechanics.name: Balloon Movement (Ghost Town)
special_mechanics.description: In Ghost Town, Mappy can travel with a balloon for alternative movement.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Sources contain gameplay descriptions and mechanics but no quantitative physics values (pixel measurements, frame data, acceleration/gravity constants, or sub-pixel precision details). Jump mechanics and movement are described qualitatively through gameplay mechanics rather than numerical parameters.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Mappy-Land article
